title: Skill YAML
description: Per-skill configuration file (skill.yaml) — defines a single skill's metadata and template variables.

name.description: Skill name (kebab-case, used for directory and skill references)

description.description: Brief description of what the skill does

variables.description: Template variables available to SKILL.md.j2 during rendering. Structure is user-defined.

harnesses.description: Per-harness overrides. Keys are harness IDs (e.g., claude, codex).

^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$.description: Override specific fields for this harness

variables.description: Harness-specific variable overrides (merged with top-level variables, harness wins)

macros.description: Harness-specific macro overrides for this skill only
